calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS BENJAMIN HINDSON, KEVIN NESS AND SERGE SAXONOV'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. Respondents do not oppose the petition. ORDER SIGNED. PETITIONERS SHALL SUBMIT A REVISED PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT THAT CONTAINS THE SUBSTANTIVE LANGUAGE OF THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE BODY OF THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT MAY BE SUBMITTED VIA E-MAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Place Under Seal The Exhibits To The Declaration Of Robert S. Shwarts In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to RESPONDENTS BIO-RAD LABORATORIES, INC. AND BIO-RAD QL., INC.'S Motion To Place Under Seal The Exhibits To The Declaration Of Robert S. Shwarts In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment, Respondents' motion for a sealing order is granted as to Exhibit D attached to the declaration of Robert S. Shwarts and denied as to Exhibits A-C to the same declaration. Exhibit D refers to respondents' trade secrets and/or proprietary information and there is an overriding interest to seal that information. Exhibits A-C do not refer to any trade secrets or proprietary information. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
